race.comment: This race has been decimated by scratchings and leaves BULL RUN (2) as the one to beat. He's a lightly raced gelding who wasn't far away at his local debut here over 1300m which was always going to be short of his best, having debuted over 2414m in the UK. Expect quick improvement up in trip in a winnable affair. JUST SWIFT (10) has just found one better in both runs back from a spell and should be ready to peak third up. Up to 1600m is ideal now, look for him late. ICHNUSA (5) is a colt by Ghaiyyath on debut for the Ciaron Maher yard who has jumped out fairly. He draws well and this trip should be ideal first time out. SEINFELD (6) was solid on debut at Pakenham and should improve up in trip.
